summary: First docs pass on runtime2-generator-obp covering coder/v1 through coder/v6 (the full v4-plan implementation plus four review-response rounds). The branch landed: source-generator OBP refactor (Discovery + Emission/Action + Emission/Property/{Data,Provider,Legacy}); Data.As<T>(context) as the v4 resolution entry with cycle (VariableResolutionCycle) + depth (ResolveDepthExceeded) ServiceError contract; PLNG001 build-time gate enforcing Data<T>/[Provider]/[VariableName] property kinds; [Sensitive] masking in ParamSnapshot with v6 null-vs-redacted distinction; the dual-capture pattern (Data<T> getter + post-Run __resolutionError check). Six gaps filled across architecture.md, data-generic-design.md, good_to_know.md, and root CLAUDE.md (stale 'Lazy params *__Generated' line replaced; stale LazyParamsGenerator.cs path replaced; Source Generator section expanded with PLNG001, incremental cache, and test alias-clash convention). Both CLAUDE.md proposals applied (folded into root CLAUDE.md instead of creating PLang/App/CLAUDE.md and PLang.Tests/CLAUDE.md per scoping decision in plan.md). No new XML docs needed — coder's XML on new public surface (Action.GetParameter, ICodeGenerated.SnapshotParams, ParamSnapshot, EquatableArray, Discovery types, Emission types) is meaningful. Build clean post-edits (0 errors). Verdict: PASS.

changes.description: Expanded 'Modules (Action Registry) → Source Generator' from one paragraph to four subsections: handler pattern, source-generator OBP shape (Discovery + Emission tree), property kinds with PLNG001 table, and the ICodeGenerated key interface including the SnapshotParams default-impl. Replaced the stale 'creates the ExecuteAsync bridge' wording with 'emits a partial-class extension on the action record itself — no separate *__Generated records'.

Appended 'Resolution semantics — cycle, depth, error contract' section. Documents the [ThreadStatic] HashSet cycle protection, ResolveDepthLimit=32 expanding-cycle bound, action-destination carve-out, and the dual-capture pattern (Data<T> getter sets __resolutionError + post-Run check in ExecuteAsync — both halves load-bearing). Clarifies that .Value is RAW post-v4 (no %var% substitution; substitution is the read transformation in As<T>).

Appended five cross-cutting entries: (a) Source Generator OBP shape + EquatableArray incremental-cache pattern + test alias clash convention; (b) Action property kinds (PLNG001 build-time gate); (c) Data.As<T> cycle/depth ServiceError contract + the dual-capture pattern with code example; (d) [Sensitive] masking in ParamSnapshot with the v6 null-guard distinction; (e) Action.GetParameter pure-lookup contract; (f) ICodeGenerated.SnapshotParams default-impl convention. These span multiple files and aren't derivable from a single source file — exactly what good_to_know.md is for per memory.

Replaced stale 'Lazy params: *__Generated records' line (line 13) with the actual partial-class shape. Replaced stale 'PLang.Generators/LazyParamsGenerator.cs' path with the new 'PLang.Generators/this.cs + Discovery + Emission/Action + Emission/Property/{Data,Provider,Legacy}' tree. Expanded Source Generator section with the OBP shape, PLNG001 property-kinds gate, EquatableArray cache stability rule, and PLang.Tests namespace-alias clash convention.

test-designer/v1 proposal (folder/namespace clash with global type aliases): applied by folding into root CLAUDE.md Source Generator section. Did NOT create PLang.Tests/CLAUDE.md — the rule is broad enough that it belongs in the canonical root, and creating a new per-folder CLAUDE.md just for one rule scatters guidance.

coder/v1 proposal (action property kinds — Data<T>/[Provider]/[VariableName]): applied by folding into root CLAUDE.md Source Generator section, augmented with the PLNG001 enforcement detail and a forward note that [VariableName] folds into Data<T> once VarRef<T> design lands. Did NOT create PLang/App/CLAUDE.md — same scoping reasoning.

claude_md_proposals.reason: Genuinely canonical — any future test folder mirroring PLang/App/Data/ or App/Variables/ hits the CS0118 alias shadow. Folded into root CLAUDE.md (no PLang.Tests/CLAUDE.md exists; creating one for a single rule scatters guidance). Same content, more discoverable location.

Genuinely canonical — PLNG001 enforces this at build time across the whole tree. Folded into root CLAUDE.md (no PLang/App/CLAUDE.md exists; the existing root Source Generator section is the right place since [VariableName] is already mentioned there). Augmented with PLNG001 detail and the VarRef<T> forward note from Documentation/Runtime2/todos.md.

findings.issue: The two new ServiceError keys (VariableResolutionCycle, ResolveDepthExceeded) bubble up through standard error.handle modifiers, but no website-doc example shows on-error-key handling for resolution failures. Most PLang developers will never trip these (real chains are 1-5 deep; cap is 32) — the keys exist as a defensive contract, not a common pattern.
findings.detail: Tester is responsible for PLang .goal examples. If we want a user-facing example showing 'on error key VariableResolutionCycle', it lives in a tester-written .test.goal file with the cycle setup. Out of scope for this docs pass — flagging for visibility.
